$comment: route: the model-driven, oracle-gated KB retrieval front-end - the AI+oracle hybrid context planner. read the high-level catalog (kb_catalog --list) -> the model PLANS which KB(s) to consult + a per-KB query -> the route_score ORACLE gates that selection (grounding + coverage), re-planning ONCE on a FAIL -> retrieve EXECUTES the verified routing via DYNAMIC search bindings (search target = the chosen KB, resolved at runtime from a slot) and pack_refs assembles the grounded context. Output is a verified, grounded context pack a downstream generate step can consume. Run: `ratchet flow . route "<task>"`.
summary: Pick which knowledge libraries to consult for a task and verify the choice with a deterministic oracle (grounding + coverage), re-planning once if the picks are groundless or miss a relevant KB.
